reasoning: Lactate clearance is your main physiological limiter, impacting your ability to maintain power over longer efforts. Your last ride was at 64% of FTP, indicating room for intensity work. Addressing this limiter with over-under efforts mimics the demands of the Alpine Loop.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 5 sets of 8-minute intervals: 2 min at 242-256W, then 6 min at 201-218W

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
